tasks.title: Implement total count metadata for Job and CrawlState listing
evidence: GET /v1/jobs and GET /v1/crawl-states support limit/offset but do not return total counts
internal/store/store.go lacks CountJobs and CountCrawlStates methods
web/src/components/JobList.tsx lacks pagination controls, unlike ResultsViewer.tsx
JobList only displays up to 100 jobs (API default) with no way to see older entries
plan: Add CountJobs and CountCrawlStates methods to internal/store/store.go
Update GET /v1/jobs and GET /v1/crawl-states handlers to include X-Total-Count header
Update App.tsx to fetch and pass totalCounts for jobs and crawl states
notes: Consistent with how X-Total-Count is already used for job results in internal/api/job_results.go

tasks.title: Enhance CrawlState with metadata (depth, source job ID) for better tracking
evidence: CrawlState currently only tracks ETag, LastModified, Hash, and LastScraped
Missing context about which job last updated the state or at what depth it was found
plan: Update model.CrawlState and DB schema to include metadata fields (jobID, depth)
Update Store.UpsertCrawlState to persist the new fields
Update crawl logic to pass metadata when saving state

tasks.title: Remove redundant secret redaction in API utility functions
evidence: writeError calls SafeMessage(err) which redacts secrets
writeJSONError (called by writeError) also calls RedactString(message), performing double redaction
plan: Refactor writeJSONError to take a pre-redacted message or move redaction to a single entry point
Ensure consistent application of redaction without unnecessary overhead

tasks.title: Update Makefile clean target to include openapi-ts error logs
evidence: web/ folder contains numerous openapi-ts-error-*.log files
make clean does not currently remove these files
plan: Add 'rm -f web/openapi-ts-error-*.log' to the clean target in Makefile

tasks.title: Ensure consistent version reporting across CLI binary, help, and API
evidence: Version info is defined in openapi.yaml and buildinfo, but not explicitly verified for consistency
CLI help menu doesn't show the dynamic build version
plan: Update CLI help template to include version from buildinfo
Add a test to ensure openapi.yaml version matches internal version
